title: Coated Blades
description: Potion effect tipped/coated weapons that inflict effects on players and mobs.
body:
![The title of the project](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47d1a5e90f5b4098eea0ecb0b477bb1b11f08e62.png)

Coat your swords and axes with potions to inflict effects on your enemies. Here are some of the key aspects of the datapack:
- All default potions obtainable in survival mode are supported.
-  When a potion is applied to your weapon, the effect amplifier and duration will be based on the potion's tipped arrow.
- The amount of uses varies between effect types, with instant or 1 minute long potion coated swords only having 8 uses, while the other effects have 32 uses.
- You can remove a potion coat by applying a water, awkward, thick, or mundane potion to the weapon.

## How to Coat a Weapon
In order to coat a weapon hold a potion in your offhand and a coatable item in your mainhand (axe or sword). Then, press your switch offhand button and the weapon will be coated.

## Blacklist Effects
If you want certain potion effects to not be coatable onto blades, unzip the datapack and go to the following file path:

```
data>coatedbladesminecraft>item_modifier
```
In the item_modifer folder, you will see a .json file for every effect in the game and a blacklist folder. To blacklist an effect, simply drag the .json of the effect you want to blacklist into the blacklist folder.
